basic_details.job_title: UPSSSC ASO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online Link Activated for 929 Assistant Statistical Officer / Assistant Research Officer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Sahayak Sankhyikiya Adhikari / Sahayak Shodh Adhikari (Sankhyiki) [Assistant Statistical Officer / Assistant Research Officer (Statistics)]
basic_details.job_category: Direct Recruitment – Permanent State Government Job
basic_details.short_information: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has released the official Assistant Statistical Officer / Assistant Research Officer (Statistics) Notification 2026 on 20 March 2026 at upsssc.gov.in. A total of 929 vacancies have been announced under the UPSSSC ASO/ARO Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 to 40 years with a qualification of Post-Graduate degree in Mathematics / Statistics / Economics / Commerce along with ‘O’ Level Computer Diploma and knowledge of Hindi in Devanagari script can apply online from 21 April 2026 to 11 May 2026. The official n

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay an application/processing fee for UPSSSC ASO/ARO Recruitment 2026. Payment can be made only via Credit Card / Debit Card / Internet Banking / UPI or SBI e-Challan. Payment through any other mode is not valid. Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances, nor can it be held in reserve for any other examination. Candidates are advised to retain proof of payment for future reference.

age_limit.age_details: 21 to 40 years (as on 1st July of the advertisement year)

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate degree in Mathematics / Mathematical Statistics / Commerce / Economics / Statistics from a recognised Indian university + Computer Diploma
qualification.nationality: Indian Citizens with domicile in Uttar Pradesh (for reservation benefits)
qualification.details: Note: Candidates who are not domiciled in Uttar Pradesh will NOT be eligible for any reservation benefit and will be treated as General/Unreserved category candidates.

salary_details.details: Posts under UPSSSC ASO/ARO Recruitment 2026 are permanent state government positions carrying an attractive pay scale as per the UP Government pay matrix. Most posts carry Level-6 pay, making this one of the most sought-after government job opportunities for Statistics/Mathematics postgraduates in Uttar Pradesh. In addition to basic pay, selected candidates are entitled to other allowances as per state government rules.

selection_process: Stage 1 – Shortlisting via PET-2025 Shortlisting based on PET-2025 normalized score. 15 times the number of vacancies (category-wise) will be shortlisted for the Main Exam. Candidates with zero, negative, or absent marks will not be shortlisted.
Stage 2 – Main Written Examination 100 objective/MCQ questions, 100 marks, 2 hours duration. Negative marking: 25% (¼ mark deducted per wrong answer).
Stage 3 – Document Verification Verification of original documents for candidates shortlisted on the basis of Main Exam merit. No TA/DA provided.
Part-2 Computer & IT Concepts, Contemporary Tech Development & Innovation 15 15
Part-3 General Information related to State of Uttar Pradesh 20 20
how_to_apply: Candidates are required to apply online only via the official UPSSSC website upsssc.gov.in. No other mode of application is permitted. Applications can be submitted from 21 April 2026 to 11 May 2026 (till midnight), after which the link will be disabled. Candidates must log in using their PET-2025 Registration Number and OTP sent to their registered mobile/email. Photo and signature will be auto-populated from PET-2025 registration and cannot be changed. Only one application per advertisement is allowed. Candidates are advised to apply well before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues and must retain a printout of the submitted form for future reference.
Visit the official website upsssc.gov.in → Homepage → Live Advertisement Segment → Advertisement No. 05-परीक्षा/2026
Login using PET-2025 Registration Number and OTP sent to registered mobile/email
Select posts/departments and fill in all mandatory details
Verify auto-populated photo and signature (cannot be changed)
Fill department preference, domicile/reservation information, and complete the Declaration section
Pay the application fee of ₹25 through the prescribed online mode before 11 May 2026
Submit the application and retain a printed copy for future reference
important_instructions: Candidates applying for UPSSSC ASO/ARO Recruitment 2026 must carefully read all instructions in the official notification before submitting their application. Only candidates who qualified PET-2025 and have been issued a score card are eligible. EWS certificate must be issued between 01-04-2026 and 11-05-2026, based on FY 2025-26 income, valid for FY 2026-27. OBC (non-creamy layer) certificate issued on or after 01-04-2025 only will be accepted. For female candidates of UP, only caste certificate issued from the father's side will be accepted. Birth date as per High School (Class 10) certificate is the only accepted proof of date of birth. UPSSSC does not communicate with candidates individually - check upsssc.gov.in regularly for all updates.

Only PET-2025 qualified candidates with a valid score card are eligible to apply. Candidates not domiciled in UP will not receive any reservation benefits. Only one application to be submitted per advertisement. EWS certificate must be issued between 01-04-2026 and 11-05-2026 (FY 2025-26 income, valid for FY 2026-27). OBC (non-creamy layer) certificate must be issued on or after 01-04-2025. Birth date as per Class 10 (High School) certificate is the only accepted proof of DOB. Exam centre, date, and time will be communicated through Admit Card only; no changes will be entertained. Application amendments allowed only up to 18 May 2026; no changes after that date. No TA/DA will be provided for document verification. Negative marking applies: ¼ mark deducted per wrong answer in the Main Examination.

faq.question: Q1. What is UPSSSC ASO/ARO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: UPSSSC ASO/ARO Recruitment 2026 is a state-level mains recruitment for 929 Assistant Statistical Officer and Assistant Research Officer (Statistics) posts under Advertisement No. 05-Exam/2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in UPSSSC ASO/ARO 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 929 vacancies have been released for Assistant Statistical Officer and Assistant Research Officer (Statistics) in various departments of the Uttar Pradesh Government.

faq.question: Q3. What are the application dates for UPSSSC ASO/ARO 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window is from 21 April 2026 to 11 May 2026, and corrections can be done up to 18 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility in terms of educational qualification?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a postgraduate degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Commerce, or related statistical disciplines from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q5. Is PET-2025 mandatory for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, only candidates who appeared in PET-2025 and possess a valid PET-2025 scorecard are eligible to apply for the ASO/ARO Main Examination 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for UPSSSC ASO/ARO 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 21 years and the maximum age is 40 years as on 01 July 2026, with relaxations as per UP government rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for UPSSSC ASO/ARO 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting based on PET-2025 scores, a main written exam of 100 marks, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the exam pattern for the main written exam?
faq.answer: The main exam has 100 objective questions for 100 marks in 2 hours, with sections on Statistics and related topics, Computer & IT, and General information about Uttar Pradesh, and 25% negative marking for wrong answers.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for UPSSSC ASO/ARO 2026?
faq.answer: The exam fee is zero for all categories, but candidates must pay an online processing fee of ₹25.

faq.question: Q10. What is the pay scale for UPSSSC ASO/ARO posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Level-6 pay, generally in the range of ₹35,400–₹1,12,400 per month as per UP government norms.
